comment: Absolutely love the Pistachio-Rose Velvet Latte! The ambiance is cozy and the staff are so warm. My go-to spot every morning.
Great service and the cold brew is exceptional. The Salted Caramel Nitro Brew is a must-try. Would love more seating though!
The Masala Chai Tea Latte is the best I've had outside of home. Ember Coffee Co. really nails the spice balance. 10/10!
